==== UserMessageImpl #1 ====
User: 
Find potential problems in 
```C#
private Vector2Int FindValidRoomPosition()
{
    int attempts = 30;
    for (int i = 0; i < attempts; i++)
    {
        int x = UnityEngine.Random.Range(1, gridSize - roomSize - 1);
        int y = UnityEngine.Random.Range(1, gridSize - roomSize - 1);
        // Skip spawn room area and its corridors
        if (IsInSpawnCorridorArea(x, y))
        {
            Debug.Log($"[GridMazeGenerator]    Attempt {i+1}: ({x},{y}) - SKIPPED (in spawn corridor area)");
            continue;
        }
        // Check if position overlaps existing rooms
        bool overlaps = false;
        for (int dx = -1; dx <= roomSize; dx++)
        {
            for (int dy = -1; dy <= roomSize; dy++)
            {
                int checkX = x + dx;
                int checkY = y + dy;
                if (checkX >= 0 && checkX < gridSize && checkY >= 0 && checkY < gridSize)
                {
                    if (grid[checkX, checkY] == GridMazeCell.Room ||
                        grid[checkX, checkY] == GridMazeCell.SpawnPoint)
                    {
                        overlaps = true;
                        break;
                    }
                }
            }
            if (overlaps) break;
        }
        if (overlaps)
        {
            Debug.Log($"[GridMazeGenerator]    Attempt {i+1}: ({x},{y}) - OVERLAPS existing room");
        }
        else
        {
            Debug.Log($"[GridMazeGenerator]    Attempt {i+1}: ({x},{y}) - VALID!");
            return new Vector2Int(x, y);
        }
    }
    Debug.LogWarning($"[GridMazeGenerator]  No valid position found after {attempts} attempts");
    return new Vector2Int(-1, -1);  // No valid position found
}
```

                Vector2Int roomPos = FindValidRoomPosition();

        /// <summary>
        /// Find valid position for a room (not blocking spawn corridors).
        /// </summary>
        /*START_USER_CODE*/private Vector2Int FindValidRoomPosition()
        {
            int attempts = 30;

            for (int i = 0; i < attempts; i++)
            {
                int x = UnityEngine.Random.Range(1, gridSize - roomSize - 1);
                int y = UnityEngine.Random.Range(1, gridSize - roomSize - 1);

                // Skip spawn room area and its corridors
                if (IsInSpawnCorridorArea(x, y))
                {
                    Debug.Log($"[GridMazeGenerator]    Attempt {i+1}: ({x},{y}) - SKIPPED (in spawn corridor area)");
                    continue;
                }

                // Check if position overlaps existing rooms
                bool overlaps = false;
                for (int dx = -1; dx <= roomSize; dx++)
                {
                    for (int dy = -1; dy <= roomSize; dy++)
                    {
                        int checkX = x + dx;
                        int checkY = y + dy;

                        if (checkX >= 0 && checkX < gridSize && checkY >= 0 && checkY < gridSize)
                        {
                            if (grid[checkX, checkY] == GridMazeCell.Room ||
                                grid[checkX, checkY] == GridMazeCell.SpawnPoint)
                            {
                                overlaps = true;
                                break;
                            }
                        }
                    }
                    if (overlaps) break;
                }

                if (overlaps)
                {
                    Debug.Log($"[GridMazeGenerator]    Attempt {i+1}: ({x},{y}) - OVERLAPS existing room");
                }
                else
                {
                    Debug.Log($"[GridMazeGenerator]    Attempt {i+1}: ({x},{y}) - VALID!");
                    return new Vector2Int(x, y);
                }
            }

            Debug.LogWarning($"[GridMazeGenerator]  No valid position found after {attempts} attempts");
            return new Vector2Int(-1, -1);  // No valid position found
        }
        /*END_USER_CODE*/
        
        private bool IsInSpawnCorridorArea(int x, int y)
        {...}

    }
}

namespace Code.Lavos.Core

        Room = 1,       
        Corridor = 2,
